Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class AccountSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataForSettings
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.AccountSettings
public class AccountSettings extends MetadataForSettings

Java class for AccountSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AccountSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MetadataForSettings">
       <sequence>
         <element name="enableAccountDiscovery" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAccountHistoryTracking" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAccountInsightsInMobile" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAccountOwnerReport" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAccountTeams" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableContactHistoryTracking" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableRelateContactToMultipleAccounts" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showViewHierarchyLink" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
